paragraphs.text: MARVELLOUS PATIENCE IN DEALING WITH ROBBERS God forbid! Nor did I want them to come back’.

One of the elders said: 213. WHY THERE ARE SIGNS AND PROBIGIES An elder of great virtue visited us and we were reading the sayings FROM GOD IN THE HOLY CHURCH of the holy fathers in <the book called> Paradise, for that elder was always very fond of going through <the sayings>. He inhaled them, One of the elders spoke of the divine prodigies which happen in the as it were, and from that <seed> he produced the fruit of every Church of God even now on account of the godless heresies which virtue, We came to the story of that elder to whom robbers came used to flourish and flourish still, and most of all because of the and said: "We have come to take everything in your cell’. When he heresy of Severus Acephalos and of the pernicious sects of the rest replied: “Take whatever yon like, children’, they took everything and of them. These prodigies occur for the assurance and confirmation went their way. But they had overlooked a purse which was of weaker souls and for the conversion of the sectaries themselves, hanging® <in the cell>. The story says that the elder took the purse if they are so disposed. For these reasons miracles were performed and ran after the robbers, shouting and saying to them: ‘Children, daily in the catholic Church of God (as they still are) by the godly take this from me which you overlooked in our cel)’. They were so fathers and, before them, by the holy martyrs. amazed at his forbearance that they gave back to the elder everything that had been in his cell. And they repented, saying to cach other: “Truly, this is a man of God’. When we read this, the elder
